entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Thank you @David_Chaviano for providing me with the opportunity under digital skills initiative.I cleared my Finance certification exam today.

Now I am S4HANA Certified Finance Consultant.

Thanks to SAP

entry.title: Re: Single Sign On to SAP Cloud Integration (CPI runtime) from an external Identity Provider
entry.content:
@Martin-Pankraz - Something that I did not explicitly mention in the blog. By all means, if the App invoking the CPI endpoint is a BTP Service that can use BTP Destinations,  it should do so by using token exchange mechanism that comes out of the box (JWTBearer / SAMLBearer). But if this is not the case, putting a component like AppRouter for the translation is always bound to raise questions as any space-scoped resource is bound to be another point of failure from a scalability point of view. 

Another point of view is that API (artifact) and IFlows are increasingly going to become 2 sides of the same coin. The lines are bound to blur there. So, usage of the Authorization Code grant type is bound to get a fillip.

entry.title: Developing with SAP Integration Suite "the page you are looking for is currently unavailable."
entry.content:
I am doing this training : Developing with SAP Integration Suite, using BTP Free Tier.

In lesson Creating an API when I test the API I get this response:

<h1>An error occurred.</h1> <p>Sorry, the page you are looking for is currently unavailable.<br/> Please try again later.</p>

It happen in Task 1: Create an API -> 4 Explore Resources View API -> step 5: Choose the Try out button. on Resources try out 

same as in step

Task 2: Test the API -> step 7: Now, choose the Send button on the bottom right of the screen.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano

I am working currently as SAP application manager (s4hana and SuccessFactors) at client with more than 13 years' experience in Saudia Arabia.

Passionate and results-driven professional with a proven track record in digital transformation and
expertise in various ERP systems including SAP, Oracle, and MS Dynamics. With a deep-rooted interest in AI, and computer programming as my college major in from Bangalore India, I strive to create attractive and innovative solutions that meet the ever-evolving needs of the industry. I am ready to contribute my talent, expertise, and passion to SAP family and be part of your team and make a significant impact in the realm of digital transformation and become SAP consultant. 

I'm eager to take a free certification attempt because I believe it will help me learn more and become even better at what I do and keep improving my skills and knowledge of SAP ecosystem in coming years.

entry.title: Re: How to read TR versions?

👉 Unlocking Success: Mastering the End-to-End Journey of Hire to Retire Business Process (1pm - 5pm)


32 participants maximum for each pre-conference seminar

Click here to learn more and to save your seat.

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Improvement Requests - Please Vote for your Favorites
entry.content:
I have had several customers ask me recently "How can they influence the features and functionality being delivered with SAP Cloud ALM?" Short of bribing the Product Developers with enormous bags of Haribo Gummy Bears, there is a way.

It is called the "Customer Influence Program" and currently includes two separate, ongoing SAP Cloud ALM Campaigns. One for SAP Continuous Influence SAP Cloud ALM for Operations and the other for SAP Customer Influence for SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation 

If you have never participated in a Customer Influence Program with SAP, the Influence process has been around for years and participation has always been pretty high. To be honest, the Influence Process was how we got most of our Support Pack Enhancements back in the old On-Prem Solution Manager days.

Now, we have the opportunity to do the same with SAP Cloud ALM. I mention Please Vote because there are a number of very positive Improvement Requests logged which have not yet reached the threshold of 10 unique customers "up-voting" them for consideration. I am starting to think maybe not enough of you know about the Influence Process. 

Up-Voting an Improvement Request is as simple as hitting the little heart at the bottom of the request. See below. It only takes seconds to read the description and decide which ones you would like to see considered by SAP Product Development.

Even better, if you don't see an Improvement Request you like, it is pretty simple to Submit Your Own New Improvement. The link is right there at the bottom of the screen. If the Improvement Request is well written (they love screenshots almost as much as Gummy Bears) and your request appeals to enough customers, you too may see your Improvement Request as a future Roadmap Item. 

Alas, as an SAP Employee, they really frown on me logging or voting on all of the great Improvement Requests so it means it is up to you as real live, bonafide users of SAP Cloud ALM to be the ones voting. One vote from each customer is all it takes. Voting is quick and easy and you too can sleep well at night because you are helping to influence the future direction of SAP Cloud ALM.

Now please do your part and go vote!

entry.title: Navigating Tax Requirements in the Digital Era: Learn How SAP Helps You Revolutionizing Compliance
entry.content:
In today's rapidly changing business environment, taxation stands as a crucial aspect for enterprises worldwide. As businesses adapt to digitalization, they face various trends that are changing tax compliance. These trends include new business models and governments' digital initiatives, which are transforming the tax landscape. Authorities are getting involved in business transactions, disrupting established processes, and taking control of the invoicing flow between suppliers and buyers. This gives them the data they need to prevent tax evasion, audit taxpayers automatically or even pre-fill tax returns. Additionally, sustainability measures and climate change regulations are also affecting tax regulations. Amidst these shifts, SAP serves as a strategic partner, providing peace of mind to navigate these complexities efficiently. By understanding the changing tax landscape, businesses can use SAP's solutions to streamline compliance processes and automate tasks, taking advantage of the emerging opportunities.

SAP offers solutions tailored to address modern tax challenges. SAP S/4HANA Cloud provides transparency and compliance on a global scale, enabling businesses to embed tax requirements in their processes. Through localized solutions that offer standardized – but flexible – business processes, SAP provides a complete suite of solutions that facilitates efficient tax management, from e-invoicing to statutory reporting and tax compliance overall. With SAP's technologies and expertise, businesses can achieve greater accuracy and agility in tax compliance, paving the way for sustainable growth and competitive advantage.

To help tax professionals to prepare for and become a valuable member of a tax transformation project, SAP introduces "Unlocking Tax Transformation with SAP," a learning course designed to equip professionals with the knowledge needed to navigate today's tax landscape and learn new capabilities that can be leveraged as part of SAP S/4HANA-enabled transformations to simplify tax compliance. Integrated with SAP's solutions, this course offers practical strategies for you to learn about the different tax types, global developments, their business relevance, and the importance of technology with a focus on SAP S/4HANA and SAP solutions for global tax management. The course starts April 30 and enrollment is now open. By enrolling in this course, tax professionals can gain valuable insights into industry best practices and leverage SAP's latest innovations to optimize their tax processes.

In a time of rapid change, SAP stands as a reliable partner, supporting businesses in their journey towards tax compliance and growth. Join us as we uncover the evolving landscape of taxation and explore opportunities for transformation. Through collaboration with SAP and a commitment to continuous learning, businesses can navigate the complexities of taxation with confidence and achieve their long-term objectives.

 

Register now, don't miss this learning opportunity!

entry.title: Business Process Integration and Assimilation in a M&A and How to Accelerate Synergy Savings.
entry.content:
Business Process Integration and Assimilation in a M&A and How to Accelerate Synergy Savings.

 The number and volume of M&A deals in Q1 of 2023 fell 25%, while aggregated deal values fell by 47%, compared to Q1 2022. This was in light of elevated inflation, interest rate hikes, geopolitical instability and compounded by the SVB crisis and the sale of Credit Suisse.1 Nonetheless, there were some large deals that were announced in Q1 of 2023 including Pfizer’s acquisition of Seagen for $42.8B, Goldman’s acquisition of SVB’s securities portfolio for $21.5B, Silverlake’s acquisition of Qualtrics for $10.4B, CVS’ acquisition of Oak Street Health for $10.4B, Apollo and Abu Dhabi Investment Authority’s acquisition of Univar for $8.2B and several others.

While industry experts believe that deal flow could brighten up in H2, the focus could also pivot to small-medium sized deals via alternative funding and an increased emphasis on creating value from a deal.2

Value creation and synergy savings is of course front and center in business process management.

Value Creation in Business Process Management

A large grocer in South America with global revenues of more than €10B Euros had recently acquired a local supermarket chain. In addition, it was modernizing its technology landscape from a legacy ERP to a cloud ERP. This created opportunities for the combined organization to utilize process management solutions to create aligned and synergistic business processes while incorporating best practices from a modern ERP stack. All this resulted in the acceleration of time to value and further efficiency savings and synergies across both organizations.

In the logistics and transportation industry, a global shipping company with revenues of more than $10B had grown through multiple acquisitions in recent years. As a result, its business processes had gotten misaligned and decentralized, leading to process inefficiencies. Using a single process management platform, it was able to identify opportunities to reduce the time and effort for managing outstanding demurrage by almost entirely. The shipper was also able to achieve process improvement benefits in invoice management, cut-off operations and booking management.

 

Deeper Value Creation

Going deeper in value creation for M&A requires an intense focus in strategic repositioning and perhaps some novel techniques. Digitization, business model innovations, and small-medium sized deals are all levers an executive has at its fingertips to create value from a deal. But, to accelerate synergy savings, executives have to be willing to look to a newer and broader set of tools that allow organizations to achieve process and administrative efficiency savings through process simplification, process mining, and process collaboration. Business process mining and intelligence solutions allow an organization to model and simulate the design of improved processes to create a single source of truth and identify wasteful process variants – this may perhaps be the key to unlocking a transaction’s full potential.

 

Sources:

1S&P Global. Global M&A by the Numbers: Q1 2023. (2023). https://www.spglobal.com/marketintelligence/en/news-insights/blog/global-ma-by-the-numbers-q1-2023

2PWC. Global M&A Industry Trends: 2023 Mid-Year Update. (2023). https://www.pwc.com/gx/en/services/deals/trends.html

entry.title: Documentation for supersonic.api and Node.js functions
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

On the flowfunction section we can add our custom js functions or some function from the marketplace, I added the 'Draw signature' function from the marketplace, but the width of the opened window to draw is fixed, no matter if the device is on portrait or landscape mode.

If the device is in portrait the window fits the screen, but if i put in landscape the window rotate but the width if the same and the drawing can only go to 2/3 of the screen.

 

I opened the 'Draw signature' js code to adjust it, and changed the 'aspectRatio' var but it doesn't change the window, just the result file, and i couldn't find any useful documentation of this 'supersonic.api'.

H

   

ow can i change the width of the window when putting the device in landscape mode.

entry.title: Re: Partition a table in HANA Deployment Infrastructure(HDI)
entry.content:
Hi @VolkerSaggau,

We are using CDS to maintain our database artifacts. Every time we make a change to an artifact, we carry out a cds build and then do the HDI deployment. However, if we make any change to a partitioned table, the partitioning is wiped out. Is there a way we can avoid this and retain the partitioning?

The partitions were created from the DB Explorer using a table alter statement.

I saw your comment above regarding .hdbmigrationtable. However, I'm not sure how this will work with CDS.

entry.title: Re: Backward slash inserted ahead of forward slash in Rest Receiver adapter
entry.content: Any news on this, I am getting same issue in SAP PO7.5

entry.title: New material type (non-valuated, no accounting view) for asset materials.
entry.content:
Dear experts, I created a new material type (non-valuated, no accounting view) for asset materials (Warehouse managed). However, we have existing asset materials (Warehouse managed) of different material types with stock.

Transferring stock from these existing asset materials (with accounting views) to the new asset materials (with the same material code) is not possible due to message number KI235 (account assignment error).

Could you please advise if the following solution is feasible?

1. Post a physical inventory to remove the stock from the existing asset materials. We can then block or set the deletion indicator for these materials.
2. Upload an initial stock entry for the materials in the new material type.

Please suggest some solution...

entry.title: Re: What configuration needs to be done either in ECC(S4)...

Thanks.

entry.title: How can assign in Identity Authentication Service IAS bulk users to a group?
entry.content:
Hello,

we created groups in Identity Authentication Service IAS.
Now we need to add hundreds of users to these groups.
We found only the option to add users one by one to a group, which is not helpful.

We could import groups via CSV file upload.

But users to a group?

 

Many Thanks!

Thomas

SAP Cloud Identity Services

entry.title: Substitution and report for tasks included in checklists (OJT)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I need your help for these 2 questions:
1-Substitution:
When revising an item we can put the substitution since the new version is equivalent to the previous version. We can do this action during a second revision. But during the third revision, the LMS SF system does not take this substitution into consideration and forces the target audience to complete the training despite the fact that we proceeded in the same way. Have you also encountered this type of system behavior and if so how did you resolve it?
 
2- Checklist report with tasks:
Is there any report in LMS Which provides the list of tasks included in one or more checklist in the same report?
 
 
Thanks in advance
Abderrahmane El idrissi

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the Data & Analytics Discussions board!
entry.content:
Hi @meganhoy 

For your attention How long do I need to wait for a blog post that I submitted for review in Data and Analytics group?

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: Can Modify standard programs in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Pu...
entry.content:
Hi Jesse,

 

It is NOT possible modify standard programs in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. The main reason is because SAP performs the upgrade of all customer systems and the core has to be protected to allow this.

 

That said, SAP provides multiple options to perform customizations (without impacting the core) to support requirements like the one you mention. Some of those options include:

  • Alternative Apps: Some apps allow you to add/remove tabs, columns and the way in which the data is displayed (to name a few characteristics). Some of the specific Apps that I would recommend to evaluate are the following: “Balance Sheet/Income Statement – Multidimensional” (is very similar to the one you added but much more flexible), “Trial Balance”, “Journal Entry Analyzer” . For all the apps you can leverage the functionality like: filters, variants (to save parameters), hierarchies, formats and more… I strongly suggest to use them and see all the available functionality (please refer to some screenshots that I added in the bottom from an internal SAP Test System)
  • You can create custom reports in Embedded SAC using the “Manage KPIs and Reports” App. This will allow you to create tailored reports based on specific needs if the previous apps don’t fully support the business requirement.
  • If the customer is planning to use Group Reporting for Financial Consolidation Processes there is also the “Group Financial Statements – Review Booklet” App

 

I hope this helps!

Ernesto Cepeda

entry.title: Re: How to Update First Name - Univeral ID
entry.content:
I have the same question.

I can change the first name of Universial id in Personal Info tab. but the first name in Accounts TAB can not be changed.

entry.title: SAP Commerce Cloud Q1 ‘24 Release Highlights
entry.content:
SAP Commerce Cloud kicked off the new year with many exciting features to help our customers drive profitable growth! Time and time again, we’ve heard how critical it is for organizations to provide connected, seamless experiences across all digital and physical channels, while driving profitable engagements and increasing lifetime value.

These themes were reiterated at the recently concluded Shoptalk event in March, where SAP showcased how organizations can drive agility and end to end processes by connecting their commerce, marketing, sales, and service data with back-office ERP data. Customers also saw how they could harness the power of insightful and AI-powered scenarios to future-proof their businesses and drive profitable growth with the power of adaptive composability. I am also extremely excited that we announced SAP Commerce Cloud, open payment framework, a new solution that extends payment options for customers. You will find more details for this later in this post.

Let’s dive in a bit more and have a look at the top features that have been released in the last 3 months for SAP Commerce Cloud. For more information and to see the product in action, take a look at the Q1 2024 Highlights webcast to learn more about our latest innovations.

 

Industry-Tailored

Achieve Profitable and Accurate Shipments Through Flexible Order Orchestration

Order Management Services empower organizations to seamlessly integrate all owned or third-party purchasing channels with fulfillment channels for consistent order experiences, a unified view of inventory, and valuable insights across all touchpoints.  SAP Order Management Services helps ensure that your organization is meeting key goals for omni-channel order orchestration, is fulfilling customer promises reliably, and is utilizing data to understand relative performance and make improvements to the business.

Gain more control for orchestrating orders with deeper decision capabilities and easy to follow logic through no-code, low-code mechanism that speeds up implementation and drives agility. For more complex decisions, you can use any number of branches with a multitude of conditions with guaranteed scalability and performance. Order Management Services can provide real-time updates to business users and end customers based on order changes in backend systems. This provides more accurate visibility into the fulfillment of orders, allows a response to late customer change requests, and reduces returns by preventing unnecessary shipments.

Branching nodes for complex decisions

 

Improve Customer Satisfaction Through Flexible Sourcing Controls, Including Bundles

SAP Order Management Sourcing and Availability provides higher agility on sourcing products that might come as a group of products sold together in a bundle. We can now source products either as a full set or as individual products, removing complexity for shoppers. This enhances revenue generation by offering products both individually and as part of sets, simultaneously boosting customer satisfaction through the assurance of complete set availability. Newly added capabilities will allow organizations to configure the following:

  • Support for sourcing and availability of sets/bundles
  • Separate availability of each product of the set when required
  • Enforce the availability of full sets/bundles
  • Option for sourcing of all products in a set/bundle from the same location

Improve Operational Efficiency through Sourcing Analytics and Insights

We’ve added the ability to review past sourcing information to improve operations in a unified commerce environment. Order specialists can go back in time and analyze requested products, selected sites, and sourcing results more broadly. This helps to gain insights through analytics that can improve operational efficiency, all without having to re-run the sourcing logic.

Enhanced Financial Services Accelerator now available on SAP Store

SAP Commerce Cloud, financial services accelerator is designed to empower organizations in the financial services sector. With its self-service and commerce capabilities, customer experiences are simplified through digitalization, reducing duplication in data collection, and providing customers with personalized product options for easier purchase decision-making. Our modern composable storefront enables insurance and banking customers to quickly customize and build their own insurance and banking products using a set of predefined process templates. The inclusion of self-service capabilities allows customers to conveniently view their dashboard, compare quotes, change policies, schedule appointments with an agent, and perform other tasks results in time savings and a streamlined experience.

SAP Commerce Cloud, financial services accelerator

 

SAP Commerce Cloud, composable storefront, also received many recent enhancements that improve the B2B buying experience, the management of user profiles, and the search experience. These enhancements provide more control, save time, and make for a more intuitive experience.

B2B Quotes Provide Greater Control and Ease of B2B Transactions Between Buyers and Sellers

Have your sellers ever wanted to be able to start and view a B2B customer quote, and to minimize the back and forth needed to finalize the transaction? This is now available in a headless fashion for SAP Commerce Cloud, composable storefront, to streamline the B2B quote process.

B2B Commerce Quotes enable the negotiation of a final price for an order between buyers and sellers. Buyers can create and submit quote requests to sellers. Alternatively, sellers can also create quote requests for their buyers using the Assisted Service Module (ASM). This lets you open a new sales channel and increases your team’s productivity by negotiating digitally with full access to customer preferences. SAP CPQ is also supported in SAP Commerce Cloud, composable storefront, to empower your sales team and partners to offer complex product configurations, optimized pricing, and great-looking proposals.

Drive Productive and Intuitive Workflows with User Experience Enhancements

We have improved the user experience with My Account UI and Recent Searches to save users time on managing their profile and viewing search history. With My Account integration from SAP Customer Data Platform, shoppers can quickly and easily manage their personal details such as email address, password, notification preferences and consents, and view service request details. This, along with previous Customer Data Platform integrations such as those highlighted in the Q3 2023 release blog, further strengthens the benefits of connecting SAP solutions.

With Recent Searches functionality, shoppers no longer need to remember what they were searching for, and if it is still relevant. Shoppers can now revisit previously used search terms, saving time and frustration while providing a streamlined search experience. Recent Searches can boost conversion rates as shoppers are more likely to make a purchase when they see search phrases they have recently used and find relevant results quickly.

On a technical note, we are also using the newer <picture> tag instead of <img> throughout for better control and better-looking images at specific screen sizes. This enables responsive image selection for modern browsers that have support for srcset and media queries. But what if you are using legacy browsers? Not to worry because, as a fallback option when srcset is not provided, the media component will use the <img> tag.

Adopt Frontend and Backend Updates More Easily

Starting in February 2024, SAP Commerce Cloud, composable storefront uses the same continuous release numbering system as core commerce (2211.21 April 9, 2024), making it easy to align the frontend and backend update releases. There is now one place for all documentation, with one continuous documentation set, clear visibility of what’s new, and the same structure as core commerce, making it simple to find content.

Around February of each year, there will also be an annual framework update release to the newest Angular version. By having the framework update release around the same time each year, we are making the updates predictable. The framework was most recently updated to Angular v17 to keep up to date with compliance and provide faster performance. According to the Angular blog, v17 improvements include “deferrable views which brings performance and developer experience to the next level, up to 90% faster runtime with a built-in control flow loops in public benchmarks, and up to 87% faster builds for hybrid rendering and 67% for client-side rendering.”

 

Connected

Extend Payments Options with Open Payment Framework [Preview]

SAP Commerce Cloud, open payment framework, available in preview now, integrates with multiple third-party payment providers, including Stripe, Adyen, Worldpay and Airwallex. Organizations can easily adopt this plug-and-play solution, reducing integration complexity. The framework is extensible and headless, enabling independent operation of front and back ends, catering to diverse channel needs, and adding innovative solutions seamlessly. It covers common payment requirements and end-to-end payment processes across authorization, capture, refunds, and re-authorization and automatic updates with security and compliance standards. It also ensures customers have the freedom to pick their preferred payment method, which enhances the checkout experience.

As we take on the challenge of payments, we hope you are as excited as we, and our partners are about this, and enjoy this sneak preview before its General Availability release!

 

Insightful

Observe, Track, and Manage Performance of SAP Commerce Cloud Environments with Personal Access Token in Dynatrace

Customers can now access Dynatrace data via API to monitor the performance of their SAP Commerce Cloud environments. Personal Access Tokens enable customers to generate a token for API usage without administrator rights. The available scopes are bound to your permissions, which means you can only use the API counterparts of authorized features, and you can only access the data from authorized management zones.

View the documentation on how to generate the Personal Access Token.

Optimize Your SAP Commerce Cloud Infrastructure Utilization for Better Performance and Compliance

Have you ever wondered if your SAP Commerce Cloud infrastructure is performing at its best? SAP experts can help you be more effective with your infrastructure usage.

With Infrastructure Assessment Service for SAP Commerce Cloud, SAP experts will review your SAP Commerce Cloud environment and highlight any areas where the infrastructure is being most heavily utilized. Specialists from SAP will dig into these areas to identify potential improvements that could reduce and optimize the use of infrastructure while enabling efficient operations for peak seasonal loads.

 

Adaptive

Painless Kubernetes Upgrades Minimizes Disruption

SAP Commerce Cloud will now remain accessible and operational throughout upgrade process with no downtime. Customers can get the latest security and performance patches without interruption from our new cloud upgrades, meaning full continuity for your customers’ shopping experiences.

What’s more is that these changes are transparent and do not require testing of your implementation. All new environment upgrades will be executed with this improved method. You can read the FAQ in SAP for Me for more details.

New SAP Store Additions Bring Innovation and Cutting-edge Solutions

Recent additions to the SAP Store bring more innovation to our ever-expanding ecosystem, enhancing your digital experiences. We are excited to spotlight OneView Commerce that enables seamless omnichannel order execution. Omnichannel order execution requires coordinating across many channels and optimizing organizational resources, with the goal of delighting the customer with a seamless, convenient shopping experience that can create loyalty and high customer lifetime value.

  • Oneview Unified Commerce Platform extends SAP Order Management Services into the physical store to maximize profitability and improve customer outcomes. Oneview Unified Commerce Platform provides shopping convenience by supporting all in-store fulfillment types for web-based orders ensuring that more orders are fulfilled rapidly and eliminates cancellations. Order types include pick up in store, reserve in store, ship from store with major carrier integration. Associate-optimized workflows also allow for efficient pick and pack orders and preparing them for customer pick up or to ship directly to the customer using built-in carrier integrations.  Finally, if you have your own last mile delivery fleet, Oneview Commerce provides an intuitive delivery driver solution for at home deliveries.

Oneview Unified Commerce Platform

 

  • Are you a new customer that needs your commerce site to go-live quickly? SAP CX Services has an Accelerated Implementation Service for SAP Commerce Cloud that enables just that. The site can be up and running in only nine weeks! SAP CX Services can help you to fast track to value by offering a fixed scope, proven and reliable approach to implement standardized features with the flexibility built in to provide you with a solution that feels unique to your business.

Finally, we have some great news to share. We are extending our end of support for deprecated Accelerator UIs to Q3 2028 (previously stated as no earlier than 2025), and you can see the updated SAP Help documentation for more details. We will also have a dedicated webcast where we will cover the technical details of this topic in depth. Keep an eye out for calendar dates in our newsletter.

For more details on the above release features, check out the following resources:

  • Q1 2024 SAP Commerce Cloud Release Readiness Kit
  • Performance Optimization Best Practices
  • SAP Commerce Cloud update cycle
  • SAP Commerce Cloud Release Navigator single access point to release content

SAP Help Portal

  • SAP Commerce Cloud What’s New

Composable Commerce

  • SAP Report: Achieving Agility in Digital Commerce: Guidance to Help Organizational Leaders Future-Proof Digital Experiences with an Agile Commerce Approach

Please share your feedback in a comment and follow our SAP Commerce Cloud topic page to connect with the community!

entry.title: Re: create dynamically a type containing an include type
entry.content: @marco_sposa Please, don't mislead future visitors by marking this answer as the solution which says don't use RTTI and your solution is to use RTTI, post your own detailed answer and mark it as the solution.

entry.title: Re: Horizon Theme and Templates for Stories in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Great article, thank you for sharing. There is a problem with the Page (https://dashboarddesign.frontify.com/), I have registered my email, but it doesn't send me guide after 2 days registration.

entry.title: Re: Does anyone use the SAP Interview Scheduling feature?

entry.title: Service Layer - Delete or edit valid value - UserFieldsMD
entry.content:
I am trying to update and reorder valid values of a UserField via Service Layer. 
If I remove the ValidValuesMD section, or if I try to add a new valid value, everything is working fine. But as soon as I want to PATCH an existing value the PATCH is executed with a "duplicate value" error.

Could it be that updating "Valid Values" (Deleting, Updating) is not possible at all via Service Layer API?
I couldn't find any solution so far. Just adding seems to be possible. 
Many thanks in advance for any feedback. 

Error: 

{
    "error": {
        "code": -5002,
        "message": {
            "lang": "en-us",
            "value": "Duplicate value "
        }
    }
}
 
Example for Patch: 
PATCH https://localhost:50000/b1s/v1/UserFieldsMD(TableName='OOPR',FieldID=19)

{
    "Description": "UDF01",
    "Name": "UDF01",
    "SubType": "st_Address",
    "TableName": "@UDT01",
    "Type": "db_Alpha",
    "ValidValuesMD": [
{"Value": "1",
"Description": "TEST 1"
},
{
"Value": "3",
"Description": "Test 3"
},
{
"Value": "2",
"Description": "test"
}
]
}

Kind Regards

entry.title: Re: How to seach in SAP Community?
entry.content:
Hi, @XaviPolo:

We have some how-to videos showing different options for fine-tuning search and looking for the latest content related to specific tags: https://pages.community.sap.com/resources/how-to-videos.

They may not get you exactly what you want, but I hope they'll give you ideas on how to narrow down your results.

Kind regards,

--Jerry

entry.title: After implementing SAP Note 3395784, Error 8 on TOC Create In ChaRM. Mismatched parameters in FM

entry.title: Is it possible to manage bindings and users in the System Landscape Directory on Premise via API
entry.content:
Dear all, 

I am trying to automate user creating, database binding, license assignment, extensionmanager add-on assignment, license reporting and monitoring via API.

What I already found is, that there is an API especially for the cloud control center. It seems that it is also reachable without CCC installed. But I wasn't able to login so far POST. https://hostname:port/sld/sld<version>.svc/LogonBySystemUser.

Does anybody now, if my idea is in general possible for onPrem installations or if CCC is necessary for that? Or are there other maybe betther possibilities for it? 

SAP Business One Cloud System Landscape Directory Service API

Many thanks in advance.

Kind Regards

entry.title: Mass contact editing in online SAP CRM.
entry.content:
Hello!

I have 150 contacts to ''Set as obsolete'' on our online CRM. Is there a way to mass edit by importing from a CSV docuement or some other way instead of doign it one by one?

Thanks!

entry.title: HOW I CAN PRVENT TIME CONFICTS BETWEEN IT2011 AND IT2002...
entry.content:
HOW I CAN PRVENT TIME CONFICTS BETWEEN IT2011 AND IT2002...FOR EXAMPLE .. IN IT2011 IF EMPLOYEE HAS TIME PAIR 8:00 AM AT P10 AT 01.01.2024 AND  16:00 AT P20 AT THESAME DAY 01.01.2024
IN IT2002 THE USER BY MISTAKE ENTER ATTENDANCE TO THE SAME EMPLOYEE AT DATE 01.01.2024 FROM 8:00 TO 12:00 HOW I CAN PREVENT THIS

entry.title: Re: Nested JSON to SAP HANA Tables with SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
So you confirm it not possible to use directly and OData post with nested data.

{
  "root": {
    "UserDetails": [
		{
			"userID": 6666,
			"username": "harshal",
			"gender": "male",
			"email": "harshal@test.com",
			"roles": [
				{ "roleID": 1 },
				{ "roleID": 2 }
			]
		}
	]
  }
}

You must to create a batch with 2 steps on for parent and other for child.

entry.title: Invoice is generated with negative net value SAP SD
entry.content:
Hey All,

When I try to create a sales order the PPR0 price condition is given, delivery document is generated for the same but when I try to create an invoice with that it's being generated with negative value, once I give the update on the pricing tab then that negative value is going away, can anyone out there help me out why it's giving negative value at the creation of invoice from VF01?

What could be possible options I can check here?

I checked the pricing determination, condition records but seems all good for me.

Please provide some guidance SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA SAP Sales Order Notification 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content: f431594f24d736826fe3386477effe2ba33695fba50ca5ca234be02e4659d1ec

entry.title: Re: Talent Intelligence Hub Migration and Impacts
entry.content:
Just FYI, your SAP Managed Tag says SAP WorkZone, which is incorrect.  You will probably want to use either Platform, or even Performance & Goals.

For your questions itself, if you are asking as a partner, unfortunately, the customer community is not for supporting partners with configuration questions. You can post questions into the partner community here:


https://groups.community.sap.com/t5/delivery-forums/ct-p/hcm-delivery-forums


In addition, please leverage the partner enablement tools listed here...

https://me.sap.com/notes/2116056/E

The reality is that the implementation steps and considerations to migrate are different for each customer situation.  Ther eare for sure special considerations if the customer is using skills in JPB already for example.   There are certainly impacts to implemented modules like RCM,PMGM, and learning, but they are mainly related to where the source of competency and skill data are sourced from.  If anything, all of the mentioned modules benefit from a customer being on TIH, as all future innovations (such as AI) will depend on whole self data related to TIH.  

I would highly recommend you leverage the informative blog from Rinky Karthik.  It should provide plenty of overview detail.   Anything additional, you should utilize the partner resources mentioned.

entry.title: SAC - Add Row total to Dimension Subtotal?
entry.content:
I am building a live report for Accounts Receivable. 
The report is based on a live BW model. So i am aware of various limitations this entails. 

With the show totals function I am able to get totals for each client # #based on different aging buckets we have created on SAP backend. The "Aging Buckets" are actually members of a dimension where the measures get aggregated on. (this dimension is located on the columns. 

So the "amount" will be aggregated based on that dimensions "Aging" where the members are the different buckets "current" , "1-30 days" , etc. 

I want to add total for the subtotal row for each customer without adding total for each and every row. This is happening when I activate "show totals" . 

Using formulas isn't a viable solution since the formula will stay linked to a cell. This being a live model, the data will change if filtered on. so the number of rows and columns may change. 

Creating an Aggregation calculation isn't viable either as this becomes a new measure and will duplicate the "Aging" dimensions members and end up looking like 2 tables. 


Summarized: I want total across the highlighted subtotal row for each customer without having totals for each row.

entry.title: Re: Testing SAP Build Process Automation task UI in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
@Mark112358 

Yes, the task ui is working in inbox app as well:

If the OData call is not working, check xs-app.json setting to see if northwind root is included.

entry.title: (PT-BR) Falha em componente "HTTP" SAP Build APP - (EN) FAIL COMPONENT "HTTP REQUEST"
entry.content:
(PT-BR 🇧🇷Boa tarde, tudo bem, eu não sei se houve alguma alteração nos sistemas que tenha relação com o componente "HTTP Request" do SAP Build App, segue imagem em anexo, eu tenho uma aplicação simples que usa este componente para enviar dados de configuração para um sensor remoto, até o dia 30 de março a aplicação compilava normalmente e o APP enviava os dados de configuração normal, mas, depois do dia 01 de abril, toda compilação final para Android não envia mais os dados via HTTP , e retorna no tratamento de erro apenas a mensagem "UNKNOW", e desde então meu projeto parou, não sei o que fazer, o mais engraçado, dentro do simulador roda perfeitamente.🇧🇷
 
 
(PT ‌‌ ‌ ‌ ) Boa tarde, tudo bem, não sei se houve alguma alteração nos sistemas que esteja relacionada ao componente "HTTP Request" do SAP Build App, veja a imagem em anexo, tenho um aplicativo simples que utiliza esse componente para enviar dados de configuração para um sensor remoto, até 30 de março o aplicativo compilava normalmente e o APP enviava dados de configuração normais, mas após 1º de abril toda compilação final para Android não envia mais dados via HTTP, e só retorna a mensagem "UNKNOW" no tratamento de erros, e desde então meu projeto parou, não sei o que fazer, o mais engraçado é que dentro do simulador ele roda perfeitamente.🇺🇸

entry.title: Workforce Analytics Implementation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

If access to Manage Workforce Analytics and Workforce Data Analytics Dictionary already exists in SAP SuccessFactors, then.

Do we only require Workforce Analytics access to be provisioned for implementing Workforce Analytics by raising a ticket with SAP or do we also require the services of an implementation partner for implementing WFA?

entry.title: Re: Errors when attempting a print preview
entry.content:
Can you print or export the report without the preview?  I think you'll get the same error.  You could also go to the Database Expert and try to log in to the database there.  If the problem is what I think it is, you won't be able to do that either.

Do you have the database client for the database you're trying to connect to installed on the computer where you're running the report?  If it's an ODBC data source, do you have the correct ODBC DSN configured - 32-bit for Crystal 2016 and older, 64-bit for Crystal 2020.  The architecture of the database client needs to match the "bit-ness" of the version of Crystal you're using, which is not necessarily the same as the architecture of the version of Windows that you're running on.

-Dell

entry.title: Binance Empfehlungscode "YZLO35M6"
entry.content:
Der Binance-Empfehlungscode "YZLO35M6" ist einer der am häufigsten registrierten eindeutigen Codes weltweit. Der Referenzcode auf der Binance-Börse ist ein Programm, das implementiert wurde, um Benutzern die Börse zu empfehlen und verschiedene Vorteile zu bieten.

Der Binance Empfehlungscode wird auch als Binance-ID-Code ausgesprochen und es gibt keinen Unterschied zwischen ihnen.

Auf der Binance-Börse können Benutzer andere Mitglieder mithilfe eines Empfehlungscodes einladen und beide Parteien erhalten verschiedene Anmeldeboni und lebenslange Provisionsrabatte. Nach den von Coinmarketcap festgelegten Kriterien gehört Binance zu den zehn besten Kryptowährungsbörsen der WelWas ist der Binance-Empfehlungscode?

Ein Binance-Empfehlungscode ist ein Promo-Code, den Sie bei der Anmeldung an der Börse verwenden können und der beim Leverage-Handel einen Gebührenrabatt erhält. Sie können den gleichen Code "YZLO35M6“ auch für Futures verwenden.

entry.title: Is there a way other than condition contracts to pay commissions?
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

Was hoping that someone could provide an alternative to condition contracts.  We are recently live with S/4 Hana private cloud.  While going through UAT with users, they felt that creating and managing condition contracts was extremely complex and too many clicks, to which I agree to a point.  Everything has to be exactly correct for a commission to accrue.

I am hoping, since our business earns contracts based on sales order, there might be a condition that can be used to perform the same function.

 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Code de parrainage Binance: ZNKAUKP3
entry.content:
Le code de parrainage Binance "ZNKAUKP3" est l'un des codes uniques les plus enregistrés dans le monde. Le code de référence sur la bourse Binance est un programme mis en œuvre pour recommander les utilisateurs vers la bourse et offrir divers avantages.

Le code de parrainage Binance est également prononcé comme code d'identification Binance et il n'y a aucune différence entre eux.

entry.title: Bybit Empfehlungscode: ADLER1909
entry.content: Was ist der Bybit-Empfehlungscode? Der höchste Empfehlungscode von Bybit wird als "ADLER1909“ bevorzugt. Dabei handelt es sich um eine Funktion, die die Kryptowährungsplattform Bybit ihren Nutzern anbietet. Bei diesem Code handelt es sich um eine spezielle Referenznummer, die Nutzer verwenden können, wenn sie ihre Freunde auf die Plattform einladen.

entry.title: Re: How to dynamically pass parameters to SimbaDSN in code
entry.content:
Are you getting an error when you run you try to set up the ODBC DSN?  When you run your code?  If so, what is the error message?

Passing parameters to the report should not be any different than with any other type of data connection.  However, I don't see in the supported platforms document that Crystal supports connections to Google BigQuery, so you probably won't be able to use that for data in Crystal.

-Dell

entry.title: Código de referencia de Bybit: 72963
entry.content:
¿Qué es el código de referencia de Bybit?

Se prefiere el código de referencia más alto de Bybit como "72963". Es una característica que ofrece la plataforma de criptomonedas Bybit a sus usuarios. Este código es un número de referencia especial que los usuarios pueden utilizar al invitar a sus amigos a la plataforma.

entry.title: Re: Settings for B1if, Configuration DIProxiegroups on 2 B1i-Servers
entry.content: @Nidhi Singh Any advice on how many DI Proxies one should have? Is there any guide or calculations we could use to determine this?

entry.title: Código de Referencia KuCoin: QBA34DLJ
entry.content:
Kucoin Código de recomendación (opcional): QBA34DLJ

Cómo utilizar el código de referencia de Kucoin. Si busca ahorrar dinero en tarifas comerciales, regístrese utilizando el código de referencia de KuCoin "QBA34DLJ" para obtener un 20% de descuento y recibir un paquete de regalo de bienvenida con un valor de hasta 250 USDT.

Con la amplia gama de criptomonedas de KuCoin disponibles para operar y su interfaz fácil de usar, podrá operar con facilidad y conveniencia. ¡No espere, comience a operar con KuCoin hoy!

entry.title: Реферальный код Binance: ZNKAUKP3
entry.content:
Реферальный код Binance "ZNKAUKP3" — один из наиболее зарегистрированных уникальных кодов во всем мире. Ссылочный код на бирже Binance — это программа, созданная для того, чтобы рекомендовать пользователям биржу и предлагать различные преимущества.

Реферальный код Binance также произносится как код Binance ID, и между ними нет никакой разницы.

entry.title: Re: Error During TO Creation--Available quantity in bin is zero(Message no. L3019)
entry.content:
Hi, I have the same problem.

show me the same message,

entry.title: Kucoin Empfehlungscode: QBSTNYS4
entry.content:
Holen Sie sich einen Rabatt bei der Krypto-Börse KuCoin mit dem Empfehlungscode: "QBSTNYS4"

Der Kucoin-Empfehlungscode "QBSTNYS4“ ist ein einzigartiger Code, der es Benutzern ermöglicht, Freunde auf die Plattform einzuladen und im Gegenzug Belohnungen zu verdienen.

Wenn sich ein neuer Benutzer mit einem Empfehlungscode anmeldet, erhalten sowohl der Empfehlungsgeber als auch der neue Benutzer Boni, beispielsweise einen Prozentsatz der vom neuen Benutzer generierten Handelsgebühren. Das Empfehlungscodesystem ist ein gemeinsames Merkmal vieler Kryptowährungsbörsen und dient als Marketinginstrument, um neue Benutzer anzuziehen und bestehende Benutzer zu motivieren, ihr Netzwerk einzubringen.

Was ist der beste Kucoin Empfehlungscode?

Um den besten Kucoin-Empfehlungscode "QBSTNYS4“ zu finden, müssen Sie ein wenig recherchieren. Es stehen viele verschiedene Codes zur Verfügung, von denen jeder verschiedene Vorteile und Boni bietet. Es ist wichtig, Faktoren wie die prozentuale Provision und die Dauer des Codes zu berücksichtigen Bonus und alle damit verbundenen spezifischen Bedingungen oder Konditionen.

Eine der besten Möglichkeiten, einen guten Empfehlungscode zu finden, besteht darin, sich Online-Foren und Communities anzusehen, in denen Kucoin-Benutzer ihre Erfahrungen und Codes austauschen. Sie können auch nach Bewertungen und Empfehlungen seriöser Quellen suchen, um sicherzustellen, dass Sie das beste Angebot erhalten.

entry.title: Code de parrainage Kucoin: QBS2KKZ3
entry.content:
Le code de parrainage Kucoin "QBS2KKZ3" a été déterminé comme le code de parrainage le plus récent et ce code offre la remise de commission la plus élevée.

Le code de parrainage Kucoin est défini comme "QBS2KKZ3". Ce code offre la remise de commission la plus élevée sur chaque transaction que vous effectuez dans le cadre de transactions au comptant et à terme sur la bourse Kucoin.

Selon les données de Coinmarketcap, Kucoin fait partie des 5 principales bourses de crypto-monnaie avec le volume de transactions, la fiabilité et le nombre d'utilisateurs les plus élevés. Si vous envisagez de vous inscrire à Kucoin, entrez le code de parrainage > terminez le processus d'authentification > effectuez les tâches bonus à la dernière étape et ajoutez des coupons de remboursement en espèces et des frais de transaction à votre compte.

entry.title: Binance Futures Referral Code: HBBQFB0W
entry.content:
To get a 20% fee discount on Binance, you can enter the code ”HBBQFB0W” in the futures referral ID field when opening your Binance account.

Binance Futures Referral Code "HBBQFB0W" is a unique code that allows users to earn rewards for referring new traders to the Binance Futures platform. By sharing your referral code with others, you can receive a percentage of their trading fees as a commission. This is a great way to earn passive income while also helping to grow the Binance Futures community.

When you sign up for a Binance Futures account, you will be given your own referral code to share with friends, family, and followers. Anyone who signs up using your code will be linked to your account, and you will start earning rewards based on their trading activity. The more people you refer, the more potential earnings you can generate.

entry.title: Binance Referral Code: C15HJGN1
entry.content:
Binance referral code: C15HJGN1 - use code


Get a maximum 20% commission discount by registering to the Binance exchange with the referral code “C15HJGN1“

Users who are going to sign up through the mobile application can enjoy the highest commission fee discount by typing the C15HJGN1 code into the referral ID section.

entry.title: Re: How to split an invoice for a single delivery with mu...
entry.content: Hi @daramex09 , you linked your question to the product SAP Order Management Foundation (OMF) (details: https://help.sap.com/viewer/product/SAP_Order_Management_Foundation/) but your question relates to ABAP-related order processing functionality. I would recommend removing this link as it doesn't relate to OMF.

entry.title: Re: Upgrading to Latest Goal Management – Cycle Planning & Preparedness – Best Practice Approach
entry.content:
@YuchingLee 

Thank you for providing the detailed images. Based on the configuration and jobs I observed, it appears that the instance will have TIH enabled. However, the image you shared yesterday does not seem to show TIH as enabled. As a result, I am not confident about the current status of the instance. I recommend confirming the instance status before proceeding.

Regarding the risk associated with manual upgrades, it will only impact the competencies configured in the development goal. If the development goal does not have any competencies or skills configured, there should be no risk in performing the manual upgrade. However, if competencies are configured, it is important to halt the manual upgrade to avoid losing the competencies information.

Thanks,

Vicky

entry.title: Org Structure associated business partner ID is shown different for a Company ID
entry.content:
After Organizational Unit is activated,is there a way to change the associated Business Partner ID?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Org Structure associated business partner ID is shown...
entry.content:
Once the Organizational Unit is already activated, there is no way to change the associated Business Partner ID .

Refer  KBA  https://me.sap.com/notes/2793335

entry.title: Re: Authentication Error in BAS When Linking Cloud Foundr...
entry.content:
You are doing what is described in step 2.1 in this tutorial, aren’t you.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/appstudio-sapui5-create.html

Share a picture of the error.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - UDF Mapping Context Issue
entry.content: Thank you. I already had this solution, inner loop was not working for me, appricate if you share it

entry.title: Re: The last purchase price of the material
entry.content: Hi Dominik, Many thanks for your support

entry.title: How to identify prorration period at rate step level
entry.content:
Hello to all,
I'm in a atypical situation, according to requirement when consuption cover a normal period I have to do calculation on monthly period basis but if I'm on a prorrated period like price changing or device replacement I have to do billing based on day period basis.
I've try using IF11, IF16 and IF17 variants but none of them do what I need.
Does anybody knows if this is posible?
Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning Data Action Advance Formula
entry.content: Hi, for that you need to further reduce the scope of the calculation to take only the date Jan 2024.

entry.title: Re: How to define ajax call in SAP MDK
entry.content:
Hi Bill, Thanks for the update, could you please help what could be the exact URL path for "Destination" and "Registration" Under mobile services section API example Destination : https://XXXXX.ap10.hana.ondemand.com/<DestinationName>

Registration: https://XXXX.cfapps.ap10.hana.ondemand.com/odata/applications/v4/<ApplicationID>/Connections

we can directly add the URL or we need to add anything suffix.

Thanks,

Krishna.

@bill_froelich
